Rabies.name: DISORDER_RABIES_NAME
Rabies.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack is a melee attack. You can't equip face armor.
After each battle, gain +2 [img:str] and -1 [img:int].
If your [img:int] is 0 or less, you have Madness.

Boils.name: DISORDER_BOILS_NAME
Boils.desc_resolved:
+1 Brace.
You spawn a puddle of creep whenever you get hit. You can't equip face armor.

Depression.name: DISORDER_DEPRESSION_NAME
Depression.desc_resolved: Adjacent units get All Stats Down 2.

BrokenLimb.name: DISORDER_BROKENLIMB_NAME
BrokenLimb.desc_resolved: You can't equip trinkets or consumables. +2 Thorns.

WrenchedNeck.name: DISORDER_WRENCHEDNECK_NAME
WrenchedNeck.desc_resolved: You can't equip neck armor. Double the effects of your head armor.

HeadTrauma.name: DISORDER_HEADTRAUMA_NAME
HeadTrauma.desc_resolved: You can't equip head armor. Your Collarless spells cost -2 mana.

DeepCut.name: DISORDER_DEEPCUT_NAME
DeepCut.desc_resolved:
Bleed 1.
You can't equip trinkets or consumables. 
Bonus ability: Bloodzerk.

PuncturedEye.name: DISORDER_PUNCTUREDEYE_NAME
PuncturedEye.desc_resolved:
+10% miss chance.
You can't equip face armor. Gain an eyeball trinket.

OCD.name: DISORDER_OCD_NAME
OCD.desc_resolved:
Bonus Ability: Groom
At the end of your turn, if you didn't use Groom, take 2 damage.

Distemper.name: DISORDER_DISTEMPER_NAME
Distemper.desc_resolved:
At the end of each battle gain +10% crit chance, +25% crit damage, and +5% miss chance. Permanently.
You can't equip face armor.

10.desc_resolved:
+50% Miss Chance, +100% Crit Chance, +250% Crit Damage.
Your movement action is used randomly each turn.

BrainDamage.name: DISORDER_BRAINDAMAGE_NAME
BrainDamage.desc_resolved: You can't use item actions. +2 Brace.

SeveredThumb.name: DISORDER_SEVEREDTHUMB_NAME
SeveredThumb.desc_resolved: You can't equip weapons. Spawn a Food pickup at the start of each battle.

PTSD.name: DISORDER_PTSD_NAME
PTSD.desc_resolved: When you take damage, gain Fear and +2 Damage.

Dyskinesia.name: DISORDER_DYSKINESIA_NAME
Dyskinesia.desc_resolved: When you end your movement, knockback all adjacent units 1 tile.

Anemia.name: DISORDER_ANEMIA_NAME
Anemia.desc_resolved:
When you take damage, you have a 10% chance to gain Bleed 1.
Gain 2 Charge for each damage you take from Bleed.

Empath.name: DISORDER_EMPATH_NAME
Empath.desc_resolved:
Take 1 damage when you deal damage.
Your heals heal for 1 extra.

Infestation.name: DISORDER_INFESTATION_NAME
Infestation.desc_resolved: At the start of your turn, you have a 50% chance to spawn a Maggot Familiar and 15% chance to spawn an enemy Flea.

Leprosy.name: DISORDER_LEPROSY_NAME
Leprosy.desc_resolved: Bruise 2. When you get hit, spawn a food pickup.

ASRFight.name: DISORDER_ASRFIGHT_NAME
ASRFight.desc_resolved: Gain +6 [img:str] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

ASRFlight.name: DISORDER_ASRFLIGHT_NAME
ASRFlight.desc_resolved: Gain +6 [img:spd] while you have 5 or fewer HP.

BloodFrenzy.name: DISORDER_BLOODFRENZY_NAME
BloodFrenzy.desc_resolved: When you kill a unit, take an extra turn with Madness.

Shunned.name: DISORDER_SHUNNED_NAME
Shunned.desc_resolved:
Take your turn last.
Your heals heal for 2 less. +15% dodge chance.

Dysentery.name: DISORDER_DYSENTERY_NAME
Dysentery.desc_resolved: 50% chance to make a burning poop directly behind you when you end your turn.

Anxiety.name: DISORDER_ANXIETY_NAME
Anxiety.desc_resolved: +10% Dodge chance. When you take damage, run away from the source.

Kamikazee.name: DISORDER_KAMIKAZE_NAME
Kamikazee.desc_resolved: You explode when you are downed.

Traumatophobia.name: DISORDER_TRAUMATOPHOBIA_NAME
Traumatophobia.desc_resolved: Whenever you take damage, move 1 tile away from the source.

StockholmSyndrome.name: DISORDER_STOCKHOLMSYNDROME_NAME
StockholmSyndrome.desc_resolved: Whenever you take damage, move toward the source.

ViolentOutbursts.name: DISORDER_VIOLENTOUTBURSTS_NAME
ViolentOutbursts.desc_resolved: When you end your turn, dash forward 2 tiles, attack with Knockback, and take 1 damage.

Scleroderma.name: DISORDER_SCLERODERMA_NAME
Scleroderma.desc_resolved: At the start of each battle, you lose all but 1 HP, but gain that much [img:shield].

Pacifist.name: DISORDER_PACIFIST_NAME
Pacifist.desc_resolved: You can't kill units. If you end your turn without using your basic attack gain 7 mana.

FrozenKnee.name: DISORDER_ZOOMIES_NAME
FrozenKnee.desc_resolved: Your movement action is a dash attack.

SchrodingerDisorder.name: DISORDER_SCHRODINGERDISORDER_NAME
SchrodingerDisorder.desc_resolved: 50% chance to start each battle dead, or alive with max hp and all stats up.

FattyLiver.name: DISORDER_FATTYLIVER_NAME
FattyLiver.desc_resolved: Whenever you lose HP, you permanently lose 1 [img:con].

CommonCold.name: DISORDER_COMMONCOLD_NAME
CommonCold.desc_resolved: Start each battle with All Stats Down. 30% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

Pox.name: DISORDER_POX_NAME
Pox.desc_resolved: 10% chance to skip your turn to scratch yourself. Your basic attack has a 50% chance to inflict Poison 1. 5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

Psychosis.name: DISORDER_PSYCHOSIS_NAME
Psychosis.desc_resolved: After your first turn, you have permanent madness.

Necrosis.name: DISORDER_NECROSIS_NAME
Necrosis.desc_resolved: When you take damage, you get -1 [img:con], -1 [img:str], and spawn poisoned food.

Touched.name: DISORDER_TOUCHED_NAME
Touched.desc_resolved: You can no longer heal HP.

Invincible.name: DISORDER_IMMORTAL_NAME
Invincible.desc_resolved:
All damage you take is reduced to 1.
When you take damage, suffer a random injury.

ExplosiveGas.name: DISORDER_BADGAS_NAME
ExplosiveGas.desc_resolved: On the first round, take your turn last. At the start of that turn, do a Mega Fart attack that inflicts Poison 2.

Toxoplasmosis.name: DISORDER_TOXOPLASMOSIS_NAME
Toxoplasmosis.desc_resolved: Start each battle with a Rat Familiar. Your basic attack charms Rat enemies.

Ebola.name: DISORDER_EBOLA_NAME
Ebola.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with Bleed 3. Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 2.
5% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

Fidgety.name: DISORDER_FIDGETY_NAME
Fidgety.desc_resolved: When you end your turn, automatically use your weapon on a random unit in range, for free.

Narcolepsy.name: DISORDER_NARCOLEPSY_NAME
Narcolepsy.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, fall asleep, heal 10 HP and gain 7 mana.

Paranoia.name: DISORDER_PARANOIA_NAME
Paranoia.desc_resolved: When a unit ends its movement directly behind you, attack it and gain Fear.

EatingDisorder.name: DISORDER_EATINGDISORDER_NAME
EatingDisorder.desc_resolved: Double the effects of your consumables but you are confused on how to eat them.

Gastritis.name: DISORDER_GASTRITIS_NAME
Gastritis.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, fart and Poison all adjacent units.

Hypomania.name: DISORDER_HYPOMANIA_NAME
Hypomania.desc_resolved: Start each battle with 3 bonus turns, then never take a turn.

Hypersomnia.name: DISORDER_HYPERSOMNIA_NAME
Hypersomnia.desc_resolved: Start each battle asleep and with full health.

KidneyStones.name: DISORDER_KIDNEYSTONE_NAME
KidneyStones.desc_resolved: When you end your turn take 1 damage and pass a kidney stone.

Cancer.name: DISORDER_CANCER_NAME
Cancer.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle, lose 3 random stats permanently and gain a random mutation.

Stinky.name: DISORDER_STINKY_NAME
Stinky.desc_resolved: Adjacent units move away from you at the start of their turns.

Incontinence.name: DISORDER_INCONTINENCE_NAME
Incontinence.desc_resolved: When you take damage, pee yourself.

Fossilized.name: DISORDER_FOSSILIZED_NAME
Fossilized.desc_resolved: +2 Brace. Slide like a rock whenever you get hit.

Triskaidekaphobia.name: DISORDER_TRISKAIDEKAPHOBIA_NAME
Triskaidekaphobia.desc_resolved: Your spells cost 0 mana. The 13th spell you cast on an adventure kills you and destroys your body.

Autism.name: DISORDER_AUTISM_NAME
Autism.desc_resolved: Spells you were born with cost -2 mana. Other spells cost +1 mana.

Tourettes.name: DISORDER_TOURETTES_NAME
Tourettes.desc_resolved: At the start of your turn, you have a 33% chance to cast one of your spells at a random target for free.

Albinism.name: DISORDER_ALBINISM_NAME
Albinism.desc_resolved:
Fire damage you take inflicts +3 Burn.
Your basic attack has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.

SleepParalysis.name: DISORDER_SLEEPPARALYSIS_NAME
SleepParalysis.desc_resolved:
When you fall asleep, a Sleep Paralysis Demon with Madness spawns! You can't wake up until it's killed.
Learn the spell Rest (if you have a free spell slot).

Diabetes.name: DISORDER_DIABETES_NAME
Diabetes.desc_resolved: When you end your turn, if you haven't eaten food, gain All Stats Down and Confusion 1. Each time you eat food, cleanse all your debuffs and gain +1 [img:int].

Bipolar.name: DISORDER_BIPOLARDISORDER_NAME
Bipolar.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with either
 +5 [img:int], +5 [img:cha], and +5 [img:spd]
or 
All Stats Down 2.

Soulless.name: DISORDER_SOULLESS_NAME
Soulless.desc_resolved: You are immune to buffs and debuffs. When you die, you don't leave a corpse.

Premonitions.name: DISORDER_THESHINING_NAME
Premonitions.desc_resolved:
Your attacks can't miss.
+15% dodge chance and +15% chance to gain Fear at the start of each turn.

PillPopper.name: DISORDER_PILLPOPPER_NAME
PillPopper.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with All Stats Down 2.
Gain All Stats Up 3 whenever you eat a pill.
You have a 50% chance to find a pill at the end of each battle.

Brave.name: DISORDER_BRAVE_NAME
Brave.desc_resolved:
Take your turn earlier.
Immune to Fear and Madness.
Attacks against you never miss.

Scatological.name: DISORDER_SCATOLOGICAL_NAME
Scatological.desc_resolved:
Heal 5 HP when you damage poop.
At the start of your turn, if you're near poop, you automatically move toward it and eat it.

Cannibal.name: DISORDER_NECROPHAGE_NAME
Cannibal.desc_resolved: At the start of your turn, if there's a dead body near you, move towards it and eat it to gain All Stats Up and heal 4 HP.

CrohnsDisease.name: DISORDER_CROHNSDISEASE_NAME
CrohnsDisease.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, you have a 20% chance to poop all over the place!

Pica.name: DISORDER_PICA_NAME
Pica.desc_resolved: When you collect a coin or scrap pickup, heal instead of gaining the pickup's normal effect.

FelineAids.name: DISORDER_FELINEAIDS_NAME
FelineAids.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 3 and Weakness 1.
Inflict Poison 3 and Weakness 1 on units that contact you.
Gain -1 [img:con] and -1 [img:spd] at the end of each battle permanently.

Dyslexia.name: DISORDER_DYSLEXIA_NAME
Dyslexia.desc_resolved: Swap 3's and 5's in the mana costs and damage values of your spells while in a battle. 6's and 9's are also swapped.

Covid.name: DISORDER_COVID_NAME
Covid.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with All Stats Down, Poison 1, and Weakness 1.
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1 and Weakness 1.
15% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

Flu.name: DISORDER_THEFLU_NAME
Flu.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with Slow 5 and Weakness 5.
Your basic attack inflicts Slow 1 and Weakness 1.
20% chance of recovering at the end of each round. Contagious.

BirdFlu.name: DISORDER_BIRDFLU_NAME
BirdFlu.desc_resolved:
Start each battle in Mockingbird Form.
You have a 20% chance to recover at the end of each battle.
Contagious.

Nudist.name: DISORDER_NUDIST_NAME
Nudist.desc_resolved:
+50% dodge chance.
You can't wear armor.

Elephantiasis.name: DISORDER_ELEPHANTIASIS_NAME
Elephantiasis.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle, gain -1 [img:spd] and +2 starting [img:shield] permanently. After 8 battles, gain Trample.

Sociopathy.name: DISORDER_SOCIOPATHY_NAME
Sociopathy.desc_resolved: You have Madness on your first turn.

SkillShare_Disorder.name: DISORDER_SKILLSHAREDISORDER_NAME
SkillShare_Disorder.desc_resolved: If you have a 2nd disorder, all other cats in your party gain it at the start of each battle.

Schizophrenia.name: DISORDER_SCHIZOPHRENIA_NAME
Schizophrenia.desc_resolved: At the end of your turn, spawn a hallucination. It has Madness, attacks any unit except you, and fades after its turn.

Lycanthropy.name: DISORDER_LYCANTHROPY_NAME
Lycanthropy.desc_resolved: 33% chance to enter Wolf Form at the start of your turn.

WobblyCat.name: DISORDER_WOBBLYCATSYNDROME_NAME
WobblyCat.desc_resolved: 25% chance to block attacks and get knocked back 10 tiles instead.

Singleton.name: DISORDER_SINGLETON_NAME
Singleton.desc_resolved:
Your max HP and mana are reduced to 1.
Damage you take is reduced to 1.
Your spells cost 1 mana.

Insomnia.name: DISORDER_INSOMNIA_NAME
Insomnia.desc_resolved:
You can't fall asleep.
You can move an extra time each turn. Exhaustion sets in on round 3.

Phony.name: DISORDER_PHONY_NAME
Phony.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with full mana.
You can't regenerate mana.

AcidReflux.name: DISORDER_ACIDREFLUX_NAME
AcidReflux.desc_resolved: Your basic attack becomes a lobbed shot with splash damage but deals 2 damage to you.

SpontaneousCombustion.name: DISORDER_SPONTANEOUSCOMBUSTION_NAME
SpontaneousCombustion.desc_resolved: When you take damage from an ability, you have a 15% chance to inflict Burn 5 on yourself and adjacent units.

TheHunger.name: DISORDER_THEHUNGER_NAME
TheHunger.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack has lifesteal.
If you don't deal damage to a unit on your turn, gain Madness 1.

Paralyzed.name: DISORDER_PARAPELEGIC_NAME
Paralyzed.desc_resolved:
The range of all your movement, dash, and jump abilities are capped at 1 unless they teleport.
Enemies won't prioritize attacking you.

GlassBones.name: DISORDER_OSTEOGENESISIMPERFECTA_NAME
GlassBones.desc_resolved:
+2 Bruise, +2 Bleed Thorns, and +2 Thorns.
When you're downed, you get injured an extra time.

BrainDead.name: DISORDER_BRAINDEAD_NAME
BrainDead.desc_resolved: Gain twice as many stats when you level up. +1 Reroll when leveling up.

TamperedGenes.name: DISORDER_TAMPEREDGENES_NAME
TamperedGenes.desc_resolved: At the end of each battle gain a random mutation. When you're downed, your corpse is destroyed.

SensoryOverloadFace.name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
SensoryOverloadFace.desc_resolved: All but your face slot is locked. Your face item's effects are tripled!

SensoryOverloadTrinket.name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
SensoryOverloadTrinket.desc_resolved: All but your trinket slot is locked. Your trinket's effects are tripled!

SensoryOverloadHead.name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
SensoryOverloadHead.desc_resolved: All but your head slot is locked. Your head item's effects are tripled!

SensoryOverloadNeck.name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
SensoryOverloadNeck.desc_resolved: All but your neck slot is locked. Your neck item's effects are tripled!

SensoryOverloadWeapon.name: DISORDER_SENSORYOVERLOAD_NAME
SensoryOverloadWeapon.desc_resolved: All but your weapon slot is locked. Your weapon's effects are tripled!

1.desc_resolved:
10% chance to cancel actions.
[s:.7]Deja Vu will go away when this cat returns to the house.[/s]

2.desc_resolved:
10% chance to cancel actions.
[s:.7]Deja Vu will go away when this cat returns to the house.[/s]

3.name: DISORDER_SEVEREDEJAVU_NAME
3.desc_resolved:
Steven has control of you now.
[s:.7]Deja Vu will go away when this cat returns to the house.[/s]

DarkOne.name: DISORDER_DARKONE_NAME
DarkOne.desc_resolved: At end of your turn, deal 1 damage to all units and heal for the damage dealt. Whenever you down an ally gain All Stats Up.

ADHD.name: DISORDER_ADHD_NAME
ADHD.desc_resolved: You have 5 seconds to make decisions, or else this cat acts on its own.

FlamingFists.name: DISORDER_FLAMINGFISTS_NAME
FlamingFists.desc_resolved: Your basic attacks inflict Burn 1. Start with Burn 1.

IntestinalProlapse.name: DISORDER_INTESTINALRPOLAPSE_NAME
IntestinalProlapse.desc_resolved: You receive double damage from behind.

BlackFetin.name: DISORDER_BLACKFETIN_NAME
BlackFetin.desc_resolved:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When an ally cat is downed, restore all your mana.

OrangeFetin.name: DISORDER_ORANGEFETIN_NAME
OrangeFetin.desc_resolved:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
When you kill an enemy, gain 3 mana and heal 2 hp.

PurpleFetin.name: DISORDER_PURPLEFETIN_NAME
PurpleFetin.desc_resolved:
You have a 10% to be AI controlled each turn.
You can reroll your level up options 3 times.
